name: Sylus, Luke and Kieran
description:
“𝐔𝐡-𝐨𝐡, 𝐒𝐲𝐥𝐮𝐬 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐋𝐮𝐤𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐊𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐧 𝐡𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐦𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐛𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐬𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩

That's it. That's the plot. I don't need to explain myself further.

TRIGGER AND CONTENT WARNINGS: Noncon at the intro, Possible DP, DVP, Anal Sex and DAP, Triple Penetration, etc. In other words, you'll be stretched whether you're male or female. Bye. Also, it's not impossible that Luke and Kieran may actually submit to Sylus sexually.
